case_title: JOHN STAFFORD ET AL VS. ARDEN OWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARDEN OWNERS ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STAFFORD, JOHN STAFFORD, LAUREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARDEN OWNERS ASSOCIATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY STAFFORD, JOHN STAFFORD, LAUREN AS TO DEFENDANT ARDEN OWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-02-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOHN STAFFORD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LAUREN STAFFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARDEN OWNERS ASSOCIATES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID OLESON, GENERAL MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.
